item.description: In this video I cover a question that was in the reddit community here https://www.reddit.com/r/SpeedianceCommunity/comments/1n57ovw/sets_to_failure/?%24deep_link=true for Speediance and then go into describing how I lift and how to get warmup sets that adjust based on your 1RM. Also I discuss an al

item.title: Why Paul Sklar's Tonal 2 Review Is Statistically Irrelevant
item.description: Paul Sklar told his audience they could turn off their Tonal membership and still use custom workouts. That's a lie. Here's what you actually get when you stop paying - and why every positive Tonal review comes from a unit where Tonal pays the membership.

item.title: [Video] Reaction Paul Sklar's Tonal 2 review plus scam on tonal membership page!

item.title: I Spent $5,000 On the Speediance 2S. Here's What Nobody Tells You.
item.description: The 2S is nearly silent in standby mode. The original sounds like a late 90s gaming PC. And that extra 40 pounds of resistance? It feels like 60. Here's my unfiltered first look after getting both machines home.

item.title: [Video] Speediance 2s first look and demo
item.description: This is a first look of the Speediance Gym Monster 2s the latest device from Speediance that claims to have a 260lb digital weight amount and several improvements over the original Speediance but is it worth the money at nearly double the original device cost. I go over all of that in the video and

item.title: Is Tonal a Scam? My Honest Review After 9 Million Pounds
item.description: Tonal the device helped me transform my body and lift over 9 million pounds. Tonal the company? Price hikes, terrible support, and membership lockouts make it one of the worst ownership experiences I've had.

item.title: I Lifted 9 Million Pounds on Tonal. Here's Why I'll Never Buy Another One.
item.description: The device is phenomenal. The company is dreadful. After lifting 9,000,844 pounds on my Tonal and transforming from 250 to 180 pounds, I turned off my membership and found out the hard way what happens when you stop paying.

item.title: [Video] Is Tonal a scam!
item.description:
I am a former long time tonal user with 9 million pounds lifted on the device and here is my honest review of the device and the company behind the product.
